name: Transition

unions.name: Action
unions.comment: All actions should be passed to the `update` function following the Elm Architecture.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: The ratio is the value of elapsed time per duration which varies from 0 to 1.

values.name: reverse
values.comment:
Start changing the `ratio` from 1 to 0.
The first argument is the duration between start and end.
Interruption is not allowed during the transition.

values.name: start
values.comment:
Start changing the `ratio` from 0 to 1.
The first argument is the duration between start and end.
Interruption is not allowed during the transition.

values.name: toggle
values.comment:
Start changing the `ratio` from 0 to 1 when current ratio is 0, from 1 to 0 when current ratio is 1.
The first argument is the duration between start and end.
Interruption is not allowed during the transition.

values.name: update
values.comment: All actions should be passed to this function following the Elm Architecture.
